lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do around here?

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: There's a list pinned up on the camp notice board, near the toilet. Have a look there for useful things you could do. I've got some rewards if you do them all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: I see you've finished building the camp for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All in a day's work!

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Thank you so much for your help! Here, take these fossils. I found them while panning! They're everywhere on this island... A quick clean up by the benches you built should help identify them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I talk to you for a moment about the fossils I find on this island?

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Sure, would you like to talk about? Normal or rare fossils?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about rare fossils, if that's okay.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Oh definitely! Did you find a new type of fossil?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not quite... I'd like you to stop rare fossils showing up on the island.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Oh..., I can do that for you, if you really want me to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: So be it, I'll spread the word, rare fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind, I'll keep collecting them.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Oh wonderful! Rare fossils are so hard to find, I'd hate for you to miss out on one.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: So you've changed your mind then? I knew you would, who can resists the hidden knowledge found in rare fossils?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I know, can you just do it for me.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: If that's what you really want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Of course you are! I'll get the word out and you'll start to see rare fossils drop again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eh, nevermind.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Fine, just let me know if you actually change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about normal fossils, if that's okay.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Of course, I'm always up for an exciting discussion about fossils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it possible that you could stop normal fossils being given to me on the island.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: ... Why would you want that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found every fossil I want and well, I'm just not interested in them anymore.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Oh... I guess can see what I can do, Only if you're sure of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Fine... I'll spread the word, you won't see fossils dropped on the island anymore... Come back to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I've changed my mind, I'll keep collecting them.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Really?! That's fantastic! Fossils are so much fun, you'd be missing out!

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Oh yes... I remember, you asked me to stop fossils dropping for you on the island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, well, I need you to let them drop again.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Really? Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Of course you are! I'll get the word out and you'll start to see fossils drop again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eh, nevermind.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Okay... let me know if you actually change your mind.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: That has been done, rare fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Excellent, you'll start to see rare fossils showing up on the island again.

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Fine, regular fossils won't drop for you anymore. Come back to me if you change your mind

lines.speaker: Peter
lines.text: Great! You'll start to see fossils showing up on the island again.
